typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	DestinationTable as string (),
	PackageExecutionID as integer (),
	RowsDeleted as integer (),
	RowsDiscarded as integer (),
	RowsInserted as integer (),
	RowsNotWrittenError as integer (),
	RowsReadError as integer (),
	RowsReadNoError as integer (),
	RowsUpdated as integer (),
	ParentPackageExecutionId as integer ()
}

source(output(
		ProductId as integer,
		DivisionCode as integer,
		ShipmentId as string,
		ShippedDate as timestamp,
		QuantityShipped as integer,
		Cost as integer,
		JobNumber as string,
		ShipmentLineNumber as integer,
		Notes as string,
		ShipmentCreatedBy as string,
		CustomerId as integer,
		CustomerShipToId as integer,
		InsideSalesUserCode as string,
		ShipmentNumber as string,
		BCDivisionSK as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT  	 SM.[ShipmentNumber] 	,ShipmentId  = G.[ShipmentId]      ,[ShippedDate] = SM.[ShippedDate]       ,[QuantityShipped] =SM.[ShippedQuantity]       ,[Cost]= SM.[Cost]       ,[ProductId] = NAV.[ProductId]       ,[JobNumber]       ,[ShipmentLineNumber]       ,[Notes]       ,[ShipmentCreatedBy] 	  ,DivisionCode = \'381\' 	  ,PSO.[CustomerId] 	  ,PSO.CustomerShipToId 	  ,PSO.InsideSalesUserCode 	  ,BCD.[DivisionSK] as BCDivisionSK 	  	  	  	    FROM [CBGDM].[Stg].[GenericShipment] SM   LEFT JOIN Stg.GenProductIdsNAV NAV ON NAV.[ProductNumber] = SM.[ProductNumber]  and SM.SourceSystemId=16   LEFT JOIN dbo.[ProjectSalesOrder] PSO ON Sm.[JobNumber] = PSO.ProjectSalesOrderNumber and PSO.SourceSystemId =16   LEFT JOIN [Stg].[GenShipmentIdsNAV] G ON G.[Spmt_Key]  = (cast(LTRIM(RTRIM(SM.[ShipmentNumber])) as varchar) + LTRIM(RTRIM(\'-\')) + CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(SM.[ShipmentLineNumber]))as varchar))    LEFT JOIN [dbo].BCDivision BCD ON BCD.[DivisionCode] = \'381\'   where SM.SourceSystemId=16',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> ReadfromSource
ReadfromSource derive(ProductId = ProductId) ~> PlaceHolderRowsReadNoError
ReadfromSource derive() ~> ReadfromSourceErrorReformat
PlaceHolderRowsReadNoError derive(SourceSystemId = $Project__SourceSystemId,
		ETLCreateDate = $System__StartTime,
		ETLExecutionID = $User__PackageExecutionID) ~> DerivedAuditandOtherColumns
ReadfromSourceErrorReformat derive() ~> ReadfromSource0
DerivedAuditandOtherColumns derive(ProductSK = $Project__SourceSystemId * 10000000000L + ProductId,
		InsideSalesPersonSK = toString((toString($Project__SourceSystemId) + '|' + InsideSalesUserCode)),
		CustomerShiptoSK = $Project__SourceSystemId * 10000000000L + CustomerShipToId,
		CustomerSK = $Project__SourceSystemId * 10000000000L + CustomerId,
		ProjectSalesOrderSK = toString((toString($Project__SourceSystemId) + '|' + JobNumber))) ~> DerivedSKs
ReadfromSource0 sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn()) ~> ReadfromSourceERROROUTPUTFILE
DerivedSKs sink(input(
		ETLCreateDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ShipmentId as integer,
		ShipmentDetailId as integer,
		InsideSalesPersonCode as string,
		CustomerSK as long,
		QuantityShipped as integer,
		ShippedDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ProductSK as long,
		ProductId as integer,
		CustomerId as integer,
		CustomerShiptoSK as long,
		BCDivisionSK as long,
		DivisionCode as string,
		SourceSystemId as long,
		ProjectSalesOrderSK as string,
		Cost as integer,
		CustomerShiptoId as integer,
		ETLExecutionID as long,
		InsideSalesPersonSK as string,
		ProjectSalesOrderNumber as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ETLCreateDate,
		ShipmentId,
		ShipmentDetailId = ShipmentLineNumber,
		InsideSalesPersonCode = InsideSalesUserCode,
		CustomerSK,
		QuantityShipped,
		ShippedDate,
		ProductSK,
		ProductId,
		CustomerId,
		CustomerShiptoSK,
		BCDivisionSK,
		DivisionCode,
		SourceSystemId,
		ProjectSalesOrderSK,
		Cost,
		CustomerShiptoId = CustomerShipToId,
		ETLExecutionID,
		InsideSalesPersonSK,
		ProjectSalesOrderNumber = JobNumber)) ~> OLEDBDestination
